zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线偏弱震荡
zh.content:
从当前走势观察，AVAX/USD最新价位于6.676，低于20日均线6.69478，且日内价格贴近区间低点运行，反映空头仍占据一定优势。若短期无法重新站稳均线，整体节奏仍以偏弱震荡为主，反弹力度预计相对有限。

技术指标方面，MACD数值为0.032362456，但缺乏信号线数据，暂不足以确认金叉或死叉方向，参考意义有所下降。RSI数据暂时缺失，因此需结合价格结构和均线位置综合判断，当前动能表现依然偏谨慎，市场情绪略显观望。

支撑方面，可重点关注6.676附近，若失守则可能进一步测试6.65区域；上方首要阻力位关注20日均线6.69478，进一步阻力可留意6.74附近。若价格有效突破阻力并放量站稳，短线反弹空间有望逐步打开。

交易策略建议保持顺势思路，激进投资者可等待突破阻力后择机跟进，稳健投资者则宜观察支撑确认情况再考虑布局。若跌破关键支撑，应严格执行止损控制风险，避免在弱势震荡阶段盲目追涨抄底。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Avalanche is showing a mildly bearish short-term tone, with AVAX/USD trading at 6.676 after a 0.98% daily decline. The price sits at the session low while remaining below the 20-period simple moving average at 6.69478, suggesting sellers retain a modest advantage. Although the trading range has been narrow between 6.7416 and 6.676, the inability to recover toward the average indicates momentum remains cautious rather than decisively negative.

The available technical indicators present a mixed picture. The MACD reading of 0.032362456 remains positive, implying that underlying momentum has not fully deteriorated, even though the signal line is unavailable for confirmation. Likewise, the absence of an RSI reading limits the ability to judge whether the market is approaching overbought or oversold conditions. As a result, traders should rely more heavily on price structure and confirmation from future candles before assuming a meaningful reversal.

Immediate support is located near 6.676, the current session low, with additional downside risk emerging if that level fails to hold. A sustained break beneath this area could encourage another wave of selling toward the mid-6.60 region. On the upside, initial resistance appears near 6.7416, followed closely by the 20-period moving average around 6.695 to 6.70, where renewed selling pressure could develop before any stronger recovery attempt.

For active traders, patience may be preferable until price either reclaims the moving average or produces a confirmed breakout above resistance. Momentum buyers could look for improving volume and stronger bullish confirmation before entering new long positions. Conversely, short-term bearish strategies become more attractive if support breaks decisively, provided risk is managed with disciplined stop-loss placement. Given the limited indicator confirmation, conservative position sizing and close monitoring of price action remain appropriate.
